flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Dutchess Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.0k → $5.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Dutchess Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.4k → $10.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Dutchess Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.7% → 0.0%).
